questions.question: A system has a deadlock scenario where four processes P1, P2, P3, and P4 are holding resources R1, R2, R3, and R4 respectively. Process P1 is holding R2, process P2 is holding R3, process P3 is holding R4, and process P4 is holding R1. What will be the outcome when P1 requests R3 and P2 requests R1?
questions.hint: Explain the deadlock scenario and describe the outcome.

questions.question: Which algorithm is used to detect deadlocks in a system?
questions.hint: List out the algorithms and describe the one used for deadlock detection.

questions.question: A deadlock is detected in a system. What is the primary step taken by the operating system to recover from the deadlock?
questions.hint: Explain the recovery process from deadlock.
